hero.name: LI YONGJIE

stats.title: By the Numbers
stats.subtitle: From 0 to 100+ engineering teams, from manual deployment to automated pipelines.

about.title: About Me
about.content: I'm a Senior DevOps / Platform Engineer with 5+ years of cross-cultural experience in cloud infrastructure. I specialize in building scalable, reliable systems and optimizing development workflows. Currently based in Tokyo, Japan, I bring a unique blend of technical expertise and international collaboration skills.

education.title: Education
education.school: Zhuhai College of Science and Technology

experience.title: Work Experience
experience.subtitle: From Freelance to NB-Intelligence, a continuously evolving career path.

items.description: Leading DevOps platform design and GitLab CI/CD pipeline implementation.
highlights: Designed and implemented DevOps platform and GitLab CI/CD pipelines, enabling fully automated build, test, and deployment workflows
Managed Tencent Cloud infrastructure with HA patterns and comprehensive monitoring for enterprise SLA requirements
Administered Linux-based private infrastructure using Bash scripting and Ansible playbooks

items.description: Orchestrated multi-environment CI/CD pipelines supporting 100+ engineering teams.
highlights: Optimized 500+ daily builds achieving 70% improvement in release success rate
Reduced feature delivery cycles from 2 weeks to 3 days for 95% of teams
Maintained sub-30-minute MTTR with zero critical outages for 12 months
Built AI-powered knowledge base chatbot using OpenAI and RAG, accelerating issue resolution by 40%
Implemented GitOps framework enhancing Jenkins job configuration efficiency by 30%

items.description: Built and optimized CI/CD infrastructure on Azure for multiple clients.
highlights: Improved customer operational efficiency by 20% through CI/CD optimization
Reduced operational costs by 15% via Terraform IaC and Bash automation
Administered Linux servers and automated provisioning workflows

items.description: Designed RESTful API interfaces and built containerization pipelines.
highlights: Designed RESTful API interfaces for modular e-commerce systems
Built Docker/Kubernetes-powered containerization pipelines
Managed Linux application servers with automated deployment scripts

skills.title: Skills & Technologies
skills.subtitle: 5+ years of cross-cloud infrastructure experience, from Azure to AWS to Tencent Cloud.

projects.title: Featured Projects
projects.subtitle: From hybrid cloud architecture to AI-driven knowledge base, 4 representative projects.

items.name: Hybrid Cloud Kubernetes Management
items.description: Cross-cloud network interconnection architecture integrating Tailscale (WireGuard) to enable seamless connectivity between multi-cloud (AWS/Azure/GCP) and on-premises nodes.
highlights: Reduced network topology complexity by 60%
Implemented zero-trust ACL-based network policies blocking 100% unauthorized access
Automated provisioning using Ansible playbooks

items.name: Azure Cloud Infrastructure
items.description: Comprehensive Azure infrastructure deployment with VNet segmentation, Firewall security, and hybrid Active Directory integration.
highlights: Deployed VNet with public/private subnets and Azure Firewall
Integrated Azure Entra ID with RBAC and Managed Identities
Reduced release cycle from 2 weeks to 3 days

items.name: Cloudflare Global CDN
items.description: Global service delivery architecture with intelligent DNS, dynamic CDN, WAF protection, and automated certificate management.
highlights: Reduced global user access latency to under 50ms
Blocked 98% of malicious traffic with WAF rules
Maintained 99% annual service availability

items.name: AI-Powered Knowledge Bot
items.description: RAG-based knowledge base chatbot using OpenAI, accelerating issue resolution and reducing onboarding time.
highlights: Accelerated issue resolution by 40%
Reduced new hire onboarding time by 50%
Python + Jenkins CI/CD integration

contact.title: Get In Touch
contact.description: I'm currently available for freelance work or full-time positions. If you have a project that needs DevOps expertise or cloud infrastructure optimization, let's discuss.
